mechanics.text:
EQUIPMENT
MEDICAL MONITORS Though doctors are trained to diagnose medica problems unless the wound readily visible they may not be able to accu: rately size up the situation. However, number of diagnostic machines are available t0 help- These machines are capable looking inside patient without the need for any incisions and can provide immediate information to the physician
temperatures into the realm of comfort for the average human ana even has basic sanitary subsystem attached: Tnis climate controi system uses fair amount of power, requiring either fre- quent rechargings or attachment to constant power surce unit usually runs off satchel battery: bubble tent resilient against cuts and tears They are manufactured in number of different sizes, though the largest can only accommodate max imum 0f dozen occupants (not taking into account personal gear; which can easily take UP occupant space).
Portable Medical Monitor The  size of brieicase; this displays the patient'$ vital information; Doctors stationed remote regions rely on them;
Filter Mask Commonly known as gas mask. filter mask is designed remove most of the impurities from normally breathable atmosphere The mask covers the wearer $ enlire face and includes clear eye lenses that can accommodate external equip ment such as night vision devices can be worn with stan dard combat helmet. special filter system, which must be changed every 24 to 72 hours at the gamemaster' $ discre tion based on the level of contamination provides protection against most atmospheric taints though affords Iittle defense against biological agents_
Life-Support Unit Medevac   teams that transport critically   injured patients use these. They are not easily portable at least without the use of vehicle life-support unit can supply oxygen_ trans planted blood and medicines t0 patient and has the capabili- ty to deliver both cardiac ad neural shocks; hopefully keeping the patient alive until better-trained medica personnel can treat him 0r her: Use of life-support unit extends the time dying character can survive (see Emergency Care 123)to WIL minutes used conjunction with portable medical monitor; medtechs working in the field suffer no skill penalties for Lack of Proper Equipment ond actually gain bonus to any med skill TNs_
Resplrator Where filter masks simply make the air morc breathable respirators draw oxygen from their own internal supply: allowing person t0 operate vacuum; at extremely high altitudes even underwater. Like filter masks respirators commonly cover the wearer' 5 entire  face_ Because its   air supply is selfcon- tained; the wearer will not fall prey to any atmospheric contam- inants (though some contaminants will attack any skin not pro tected by an environment suit). The respirator includes tank that can provide nours breathable air; Additiona tanks can be worn, but these increase the mass of the respirator system and automatically encumber the wearer; up t0 three total tanks can be worn, but this makes the character very encumbered
BURVIVAL OEAR Whether on a uninhabitable planet, in room filled with gas or simply camping the mountains; characters will need some amount of specialized gear. The following will help them survive all but the worst environments_
Baslc Fleld Klt Some equipment is absolutely necessary person survive in the wilderness The basic field kit contains all of those items for one individual, This includes compact sleep ing bag; canteen, fire-starting devices knife [wO days' worth emergency nutrition tablets and so on. character with this kit can use the Survival Skill without suffering Lack 0l Proper Equipment Modifier:
Environment Suits Environment suits seal the wearer in an airtight suit that protects against hostile environments and biological and chem- ical agents They do not restrict the wearer' motions, and they afford an unobstructed view from polarized faceplate. An air supply must be attached_ such as an air tank or direct con- nection t0 ship' life-support system; These suits work on an overpressure principle helping to ensure that the suit is somehow punctured any possible contaminants are prevented from entering Environment suits worn areas where biological weapons were used are normally destroyed t0 prevent any acci dental contamination clean areas Light Environment Sult: This is the most commonly used suit of its ilk; designed for standard and low- pressure environ: ments only- These suits are constructed from resilient polymers that maintain enough flexibility to allow wearers full range f motion They can be worn over Standard work clothing; though frequent users commonly wear only Iight garments under their suits to keep from overheating
Advanced Fleld Kit The advanced field kit includes all of the same items as the basic kit but has enough equipment for person t0 sur vive sev- weeks in the wild Some of the items included are an inflat: able mattress_ thermal blankets, miniature stove and Iantern and the  like all packaged in single ruck sack. This item allows character t0 use the Survivae Skill without suffering Lack of Proper Equipment Modifier:
Bubble Tent Relatively lightweignt and easy to set up, bubble tents pro vide shelter even in the harshest environments_ The tent must be set Up in an environment which human can breathe The tent contains climate-control system that can bring extreme
